prose.en: Restrict the use of organization-controlled portable storage devices by authorized individuals on external systems using {param:ac-20.02_odp}.

guidance.en: Limits on the use of organization-controlled portable storage devices in external systems include restrictions on how the devices may be used and under what conditions the devices may be used.

prose.en: the use of organization-controlled portable storage devices by authorized individuals is restricted on external systems using {param:ac-20.02_odp}.

objects.en: procedures addressing the use of external systems
system configuration settings and associated documentation
Organizational personnel with responsibilities for restricting or prohibiting the use of organization-controlled storage devices on external systems
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Mechanisms implementing restrictions on the use of portable storage devices

guidelines.en: restrictions on the use of organization-controlled portable storage devices by authorized individuals on external systems are defined;
